Leadership

Quinnlan Varcoe

Principal DFIR Consultant & digital privacy expert — with Fortune 50 incident response experience across defense, healthcare, and telecommunications.

Quinnlan Varcoe
Principal DFIR Consultant

Private DFIR consultant and digital privacy expert with Fortune 50 incident response experience across the defense, healthcare, and telecommunications sectors. Known industry-wide for deeply technical threat intelligence analysis and a 26,000+ professional following built entirely on operational credibility — not marketing.

Since founding Digital Forensics .company in 2022, Quinnlan has served breach counsel attorneys, defense contractors, IT businesses, and high-value individuals requiring emergency forensic investigation and ongoing digital privacy protection. When organizations get breached, she's the call they make.

T-MobileRaytheonCVS HealthDFIRDigital PrivacyThreat IntelIncident ResponseLog4j Response
Connect on LinkedIn →
Career
Professional Timeline
2022 — Present
Principal DFIR Consultant — Digital Forensics .company
Private digital forensics and incident response practice serving breach counsel attorneys, IT businesses, defense contractors, and high-value individuals. Emergency breach response, forensic investigation, digital privacy protection, and expert witness services.
2021 — 2024
Raytheon — Cybersecurity Operations
Operated within the defense industrial base, gaining deep expertise in CMMC, NIST 800-171, ITAR compliance, and the nation-state threat landscape targeting defense contractors.
2020 — 2022
CVS Health — Incident Response & Threat Detection
Led incident response and threat detection across one of America's largest Fortune 50 health enterprises. Managed high-severity security incidents and specialized in HIPAA-compliant forensic investigation.
2018 — 2021
T-Mobile — Threat Intelligence
Built and executed threat intelligence operations in the telecommunications sector. Tracked advanced persistent threats and developed actionable intelligence for defensive operations.
